name: @withinfocus/statbotics-mcp-server
description: Provides access to the Statbotics API for FIRST Robotics Competition statistical data and predictions. Enables AI assistants and other MCP clients to retrieve FRC team EPA ratings, event predictions, and match analytics.

tools.name: get_year
tools.description: Get statistical data for a specific FRC season year

tools.name: get_years
tools.description: Get statistical data for multiple FRC season years

tools.name: get_team
tools.description: Get statistical data for a specific FRC team

tools.name: get_teams
tools.description: Get statistical data for multiple FRC teams with filtering

tools.name: get_team_year
tools.description: Get a team's statistics for a specific year

tools.name: get_event
tools.description: Get statistical data for a specific FRC event

tools.name: get_events
tools.description: Get statistical data for multiple FRC events with filtering

tools.name: get_team_event
tools.description: Get a team's statistics at a specific event

tools.name: get_match
tools.description: Get statistical data for a specific match

tools.name: get_matches
tools.description: Get statistical data for multiple matches with filtering

tools.name: get_team_match
tools.description: Get a team's statistics for a specific match
